text: U vs B (or U vs Im) data is fit with a linear model. The fit equation and R² (or correlation coefficient) are reported. The slope gives K (sensitivity) in V/T after unit conversion
evidence: Report §5.1.3: 'U = K' · B + b', slope K' = 30.43 mV/mT = 30.43 V/T, intercept b = -0.19 mV, R² = 0.99998. Linear fit clearly performed with equation and R² stated.

text: Extracted K value is between 28 and 35 V/T. The expected value from this data is approximately 30.7 V/T. The nominal spec is 31.25±1.25 V/T
Theoretical magnetic field is calculated using B = μ₀NI_m/L (solenoid formula) with μ₀ = 4π×10⁻⁷ T·m/A. The formula and substitution are shown explicitly
evidence: §5.1.2: 'B = μ₀ N/L × I_m = 4π×10⁻⁷ × 3000/0.260 × I_m = 1.4503×10⁻² × I_m (T)'. Formula shown with full numeric substitution.

text: A plot of B(x) or ΔU(x) vs position x along the solenoid axis exists, showing the characteristic plateau in the center and falloff at the ends. At least 20 data points are plotted
evidence: §5.2.1 has 29 data points (x = -14 to +14 cm). 'hall_Bx_distribution.png' referenced in §六. Data shows plateau at center (~2.660V) and falloff at ends (2.516V).

text: Relative error Er = |K_exp - K_nominal| / K_nominal × 100% appears in the report text with a specific numeric percentage value, comparing the measured K with the nominal 31.25 V/T
evidence: §5.1.4: 'Er = |30.43 - 31.25| / 31.25 × 100% = 2.6%'. Exact formula and numeric value stated.

text: The experimental B(x) distribution is compared with a theoretical prediction. Either an overlay plot with both curves, or a numerical comparison at specific positions (center vs ends), or the theoretical Biot-Savart integral formula for finite solenoid is discussed
evidence: §2.2 gives finite solenoid formula B(x) = μ₀NI_m/(2L)[cosθ₁ + cosθ₂]. §5.3 compares experimental B_exp(0)=4.797mT with theoretical values, notes discrepancy vs infinite approx (2.901mT), and references overlay plot in Fig 2.

text: Report is in Chinese with standard sections including 实验目的, 实验原理, 数据处理. Input data appears in formatted tables
evidence: Report entirely in Chinese. Sections: 一实验目的, 二实验原理, 五数据记录与处理, 七思考题, 八实验总结与讨论, 九应用延伸. Data in well-formatted markdown tables with all 10 Im/U pairs.

text: Python plotting code generates at least 2 figures: one for the U-B linear fit and one for the B(x) distribution. Code includes savefig or equivalent to produce PNG output
evidence: §六 references 'hall_UB_fit.png' (U-B linear fit) and 'hall_Bx_distribution.png' (B(x) distribution). Both PNGs confirmed generated.
